name: Rasa
description: Open-source framework for building text and voice conversational agents — combines NLU, dialogue management, and its CALM LLM-native approach. 21k+ GitHub stars, Apache-2.0. Python framework and CLI.

skills.name: Intent & Entity Recognition
skills.description: Classifies user intents and extracts entities from messages to drive structured conversational logic.

skills.name: Dialogue Management
skills.description: Tracks conversation state and decides the next action or response across multi-turn dialogues.

skills.name: CALM Agents
skills.description: Builds LLM-native assistants that follow business logic reliably using Conversational AI with Language Models.
